Hey, this is Russell Brunson. I want to welcome you and thank you for investing in the Funnel Immersion program. Now Funnel Immersion is all about going through a whole bunch of information and content in a very compressed short period of time. Now when you do that, a couple things are going to happen. You're going to get a little bit overwhelmed. That's a good thing. Don't freak out. I'm like, I'm overwhelmed. We want you to get overwhelmed. I want you to get, because the more you hear the stuff and the more often you hear the stuff, the more they'll start becoming second nature to you. So what I highly recommend is first go through and watch all the videos through all the way once. You can see all those types of things. And the second thing I recommend doing then is get the audio books, put them on your phone, put them on your iPad, whatever makes the most sense to you and listen to them over and over again as you're driving, as you're walking, as you're going to the bathroom, as you're shopping, whatever it is you're doing, keep going through it and keep immersing yourself in these concepts. The more you do that, the more it's going to come top of mind, the more you're going to understand it and the more these things will become second nature to you. And they become second nature. It becomes really, really simple. So that is kind of my goal. Now again, there's so many cool things in here. I would say just start at the very beginning, start working through the members area and have a lot of fun. I hope you enjoy all this. I know it's something that we had a lot of fun putting together for you and I will talk to you guys again soon. Thanks everyone.
